title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You got so many! It seems I underestimated your
abilities.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
They can sit on my desk while I study in my dorm
room and join me in bed when I go to sleep.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
We'll forge a bond like master and student, racer
and trainer, or parent and child! Osu!
